# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy-staging
  - deploy-production

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRY: "30d"

build:
  stage: build
  image: ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/build-base:latest
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - make build
    - echo "Creating artifacts..."
    - mkdir -p artifacts/
    - cp -r bin/ config/ artifacts/
    - echo "Validating artifacts..."
    - sha256sum artifacts/* > artifacts/checksums.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: ${ARTIFACT_EXPIRY}
    reports:
      junit: test-results.xml
  only:
    - main
    - merge_requests
  except:
    - schedules

deploy-staging:
  stage: deploy-staging
  image: ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/deploy-base:latest
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts from build job..."
    - mkdir -p /tmp/artifacts/
    - echo "Validating artifact integrity..."
    - if [ ! -f "artifacts/checksums.txt" ]; then echo "Checksum file missing"; exit 1; fi
    - echo "Verifying checksums..."
    - sha256sum -c artifacts/checksums.txt
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - ./deploy.sh --target staging --config config/staging.yaml
  dependencies:
    - build
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - main
  except:
    - schedules
  before_script:
    - echo "Setting up secure environment..."
    - export DEPLOY_TOKEN=$(echo $DEPLOY_TOKEN | base64 -d)
    - echo "Validating deployment token..."
    - if [ -z "$DEPLOY_TOKEN" ]; then echo "Deployment token missing"; exit 1; fi

deploy-production:
  stage: deploy-production
  image: ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/deploy-base:latest
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts from build job..."
    - echo "Validating artifact integrity..."
    - if [ ! -f "artifacts/checksums.txt" ]; then echo "Checksum file missing"; exit 1; fi
    - echo "Verifying checksums..."
    - sha256sum -c artifacts/checksums.txt
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - ./deploy.sh --target production --config config/production.yaml
  dependencies:
    - build
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://prod.example.com
  only:
    - main
  when: manual
  except:
    - schedules
  before_script:
    - echo "Setting up secure production environment..."
    - export PROD_DEPLOY_TOKEN=$(echo $PROD_DEPLOY_TOKEN | base64 -d)
    - echo "Validating production deployment token..."
    - if [ -z "$PROD_DEPLOY_TOKEN" ]; then echo "Production deployment token missing"; exit 1; fi
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
